name: Tuscan Bean Soup with Greens
recipeIngredient: 3 sprigs fresh thyme or 1 teaspoon dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until translucent (about 5 minutes).
3. Stir in garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. In a saucepan, heat chicken stock over medium heat.
5. Add broccoli rabe and kale to the saucepan; stir frequently until wilted (about 5 minutes).
6. Drain beans, reserving some liquid if desired, then add them to the pot with the cooked onions and garlic.
7. Pour in the hot chicken stock from the saucepan.
8. Squeeze out the tomatoes into the pot, adding juice as well; stir to combine.
9. Add thyme (fresh or dried) and season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Bring the soup to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook until thoroughly heated through (about 20-25 minutes).
11. Adjust seasoning if needed before serving.
Yield: 4 servings
